channel.title: 网络科学 on Yuan's Library
channel.description: Recent content in 网络科学 on Yuan's Library

item.title: Spectra of Random Graphs with Given Expected Degrees
item.description:
Spectra of Random Graphs

with Given Expected Degrees

Fan Chung · Linyuan Lu · Van Vu · PNAS, 2003

Abstract

In the study of power-law graph spectra, two competing approaches exist: Wigner's semicircle law vs power-law eigenvalue distribution. Chung, Lu, and Vu reconcile both by showing the Laplacian follows the semicircle law while the adjacency matrix obeys the power law. Results are based on random graphs with given expected degrees, with phase transitions at β = 2.5.
